title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
description: Given a string s, find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters.

examples.explanation: The longest substring without repeating characters is 'abc', which has a length of 3.
The longest substring without repeating characters is 'b', with a length of 1.
The longest substring without repeating characters is 'wke', which has a length of 3. Note that the answer must be a substring, 'pw' is also a valid substring but shorter.

constraints: s consists of English letters, digits, symbols and spaces.
hints: Consider using a sliding window approach to track the current substring.
Utilize a hash map to store the last index of each character.
If you encounter a repeating character, move the start of your window.
Think about how to efficiently check for duplicates as you expand your window.
